display.name: Deliver Supplies
display.short_description: A worried quartermaster needs a live bundle carried through the stage to a safer pocket of the road.

rules.briefing_text: Carry the supply bundle to the marked safe stop. It takes backpack space the whole way, but the hamlet will pay for the trouble.
rules.accepted_text: The marked stop can take the bundle now. Reach it intact, then return here for payment.
rules.completed_text: The supplies made it through. Choose one hamlet reward before you move on.
rules.claimed_text: The quartermaster has already marked this delivery complete.
